summary: Iteration-7 verified: change-credentials, grievances, admin overview redesign (stations-uploaded modal + photos-analysed SM dropdown + all-stations descending bar chart + Today uploads + PDF), AdminInspections date-range gating + PDF, Reports pie chart with independent date filter + Uploads KPI/Total uploads removed, Analytics deleted, SM grievance section, admin Grievances page. Backend 14/14 pytest passing, all UI testids/flows verified live.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py POST /api/grievances returns 400 only when station or message is empty after strip, but does NOT enforce a minimum message length. Acceptable but consider min length 3+ to prevent spam.

server.py DELETE /api/grievances/{gid} is a soft-delete (is_deleted=True). No hard delete endpoint. Fine for audit, but the request wording 'delete' could be misinterpreted by admins expecting a purge. Consider a UI tooltip.
AccountMenu.jsx swaps the token via setSession in-place — verified working; no other tabs sync, but acceptable for this single-tab admin app.

AdminDashboard StationsUploadedCard triggers day-detail fetch on click only when clicked (no eager fetch) — good for load. But if admin toggles date range, dialog isn't invalidated; if reopened later it may show stale counts. Minor.

Reports.jsx pie chart uses its own from/to state that calls /api/reports/summary independently — verified; ensure spinner or empty-state when pie range has no data (currently shows empty pie silently).
test_credentials: admin/Admin@123, sm001/Station@123, sm045/Station@123 (used for change-credentials test, reverted at end).
seed_data_creation: test_iter7.py created 3 TEST_-prefixed grievances via sm001 (one admin-resolved, one admin-deleted, one still open). One UI grievance also created from the SM upload page during automation. sm001 upload regression test created 1 fresh inspection at RNC.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter7 features verified live end-to-end. sm045 credentials were restored to defaults. Recognize the false-negative that 'Today uploads' text is rendered via CSS text-transform: uppercase, so playwright inner_text sees it as 'TODAY UPLOADS'. Use the DOM source or case-insensitive check.
